issues.description: Cites specific external study resources not in the reference: 'OpenStax Calculus Volume One chapters four-point-one through four-point-seven' and 'Khan Academy Unit Four practice set on AP Calculus AB'. These resource names/chapter numbers cannot be verified against the terse CED reference.
issues.fix: verify (external resource citation; harmless if accurate, but unsupported by reference)

issues.description: Forward reference to 'Module Five: the Mean Value Theorem, Extreme Value Theorem, and the derivative tests' — Unit 5 content is outside the provided Unit 4 reference and cannot be confirmed.
issues.fix: verify against Unit 5 reference (out of scope here)

notes: All Unit 4 academic claims — derivative units, position/velocity/acceleration chain, related rates four-step method, linearization formula, and L'Hospital's Rule restricted to 0/0 or ∞/∞ indeterminate forms — are consistent with the reference; only external study-resource names and a Unit 5 forward reference fall outside it, both minor.
